series_metadata.series_title: SD Income Tax Extension Payment Voucher
series_metadata.series_description: This form is a payment voucher sent by taxpayer with SD-100 when balance due is remitted.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Original kept for 6 months after scanned then destroyed. ; Electronic: Electronic record kept for 10 years via the ODT Info Image Systems, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
